    SAFETY - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.ModuleType
    Module related to safety procedures and compliance.

    SERVING_END - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLogType
    Indicates the end of alcohol serving.
    SERVING_START - Enum constant in enum class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLogType
    Indicates the start of alcohol serving.

    Sets the optional notes attached to the log entry.
    setOrganization(Organization) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Sets the organization that the log entry belongs to.
    setRecordedAt(LocalDateTime) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Sets the exact date and time when the log was recorded.
    setRecordedBy(User) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Sets the user who recorded the log entry.

    Sets whether service was denied.
    setShiftDate(LocalDate) - Method in class ntnu.no.fs_v26.model.AlcoholLog
    Sets the shift date associated with the log entry.

    Determines whether the current request should bypass this filter.
